title: Assistant Store Manager - Nerolac Select - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Nerolac Select - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
We at Nerolac Select are looking for an experienced Assistant Store Manager based out of Pimpri-Chinchwad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Nerolac Select:
Nerolac Select is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nerolac Select!
